items.caption: An empty bedroom with a large closet. the closet features multiple white shelves, and the room is illuminated by a ceiling light. the walls are painted a light beige color, and there is a bed with a blue and white comforter in the background. the room appears to be well-lit and clean, with no visible furniture or personal items. the style of the image is a straightforward, real-life photograph with no apparent filters or artistic effects.

An interior view of a large, empty bedroom with a sliding glass door leading to a balcony. the room has a neutral color palette with light-colored walls and a beige carpet. there is a window on the left wall, and a white door is partially visible on the right. the room is well-lit, suggesting it is daytime. the style of the image is a real estate photograph, designed to showcase the space for potential buyers.
